name: pkc2-extension-tools
description: PKC2 と PKC-Message で通信する単一 HTML ツール群(PKC2-Extensions)。各ツールは tools/<name>/ で開発し、dist/ に単一 HTML として出力する。

scripts.build:a1: vite build -c tools/a1-message-probe/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs a1-message-probe
scripts.build:a3: vite build -c tools/a3-capability-matrix/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs a3-capability-matrix
scripts.build:a4: vite build -c tools/a4-traffic-recorder/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs a4-traffic-recorder
scripts.build:a5: vite build -c tools/a5-replay-player/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs a5-replay-player
scripts.build:b2: vite build -c tools/b2-todo-quick-sender/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs b2-todo-quick-sender
scripts.build:b3: vite build -c tools/b3-textlog-journaler/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs b3-textlog-journaler
scripts.build:b4: vite build -c tools/b4-web-clipper/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs b4-web-clipper
scripts.build:b6: vite build -c tools/b6-csv-importer/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs b6-csv-importer
scripts.build:b7: vite build -c tools/b7-markdown-batch/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs b7-markdown-batch
scripts.build:b8: vite build -c tools/b8-bookmark-importer/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs b8-bookmark-importer
scripts.build:b9: vite build -c tools/b9-rss-fetcher/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs b9-rss-fetcher
scripts.build:b13: vite build -c tools/b13-pomodoro-logger/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs b13-pomodoro-logger
scripts.build:b15: vite build -c tools/b15-form-template/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs b15-form-template
scripts.build:c1: vite build -c tools/c1-export-downloader/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs c1-export-downloader
scripts.build:d1: vite build -c tools/d1-multi-broadcaster/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs d1-multi-broadcaster
scripts.build:d2: vite build -c tools/d2-a-to-b-bridge/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs d2-a-to-b-bridge
scripts.build:e1: vite build -c tools/e1-reading-list/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs e1-reading-list
scripts.build:e2: vite build -c tools/e2-expense-tracker/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs e2-expense-tracker
scripts.build:e3: vite build -c tools/e3-habit-tracker/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs e3-habit-tracker
scripts.build:e4: vite build -c tools/e4-meeting-notes/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs e4-meeting-notes
scripts.build:e5: vite build -c tools/e5-gratitude-journal/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs e5-gratitude-journal
scripts.build:e6: vite build -c tools/e6-weekly-review/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs e6-weekly-review
scripts.build:e7: vite build -c tools/e7-learning-cards/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs e7-learning-cards
scripts.build:g1: vite build -c tools/g1-filer-pro/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs g1-filer-pro
scripts.build:f2: vite build -c tools/f2-email-viewer/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs f2-email-viewer
scripts.build:f3: vite build -c tools/f3-docx-viewer/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs f3-docx-viewer
scripts.build:f4: vite build -c tools/f4-pptx-viewer/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs f4-pptx-viewer
scripts.build:f5: vite build -c tools/f5-xlsx-viewer/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs f5-xlsx-viewer
scripts.build:f6: vite build -c tools/f6-pdf-viewer/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs f6-pdf-viewer
scripts.build:f7: vite build -c tools/f7-mermaid-editor/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs f7-mermaid-editor
scripts.build:f8: vite build -c tools/f8-drawio-editor/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs f8-drawio-editor
scripts.build:f9: vite build -c tools/f9-md-note/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs f9-md-note
scripts.build:f10: vite build -c tools/f10-canvas-sketcher/vite.config.ts && node build/singlefile.mjs f10-canvas-sketcher
scripts.build: npm run build:a1 && npm run build:a2 && npm run build:a3 && npm run build:a4 && npm run build:a5 && npm run build:b1 && npm run build:b2 && npm run build:b3 && npm run build:b4 && npm run build:b6 && npm run build:b7 && npm run build:b8 && npm run build:b9 && npm run build:b13 && npm run build:b14 && npm run build:b15 && npm run build:c1 && npm run build:d1 && npm run build:d2 && npm run build:e1 && npm run build:e2 && npm run build:e3 && npm run build:e4 && npm run build:e5 && npm run build:e6 && npm run build:e7 && npm run build:g1 && npm run build:f1 && npm run build:f2 && npm run build:f3 && npm run build:f4 && npm run build:f5 && npm run build:f6 && npm run build:f7 && npm run build:f8 && npm run build:f9 && npm run build:f10
